props.description: The variant changes the color of the status light. When status lights have a semantic meaning, they should use the variant for semantic colors.
The content to display as the label.

An accessibility role for the status light. Should be set when the status can change at runtime, and no more than one status light will update simultaneously. For cases where multiple statuses can change at the same time, use a Toast instead.
Spectrum-defined styles, returned by the `style()` macro.
